model: R14 claim tree: APEX root + 6 branches, single-parent (primaryEpic = the claim's home epic facet), shallow epic->claim, no orphans. alsoSupports records the non-home epics the claim edges to in the R15 DAG.

epics.title: Cautilus keeps agent/workflow behavior honest across prompt/skill/wrapper change
The Cautilus Agent owns workflow routing, sequencing, and guardrails
The Cautilus Agent curates discovery packets and drives structured review
Cautilus installs as a shared machine-level binary plus repo-local agent surface (no scaffold copy)
doctor/version report setup, onboarding, agent-surface, and wiring readiness
Claim discovery turns adapter-owned docs + linked Markdown into bounded proof-plan candidates (not a verdict)
Deterministic claim review/refresh: cluster, apply-review, refresh, status, stale-gating, model-spend gating
evaluate fixture/observation runs checked-in inputs through adapter-owned runners and evaluates the packet
Scenario proposal/attention and skill-experiment compare over preserved baseline/variant outputs
Improvement search/revision is bounded by budgets, checkpoints, and blocked-readiness (bounded autonomy)
Cautilus is proven on itself: specs, dogfood evidence, held-out validation, structured review
